content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be reframed as a self-organizing ecosystem where the agent itself acts as the top-level curator of its own memory patches, rather than just a tool that uses a static memory architecture. This reframing means curiosity-driven exploration for new training data (a core active learning mechanic) doubles as ecological succession for the agent’s memory ecosystem, where uninformative memory traces get pruned like underperforming species in a changing habitat.
